{{- define "main" }} {{/* 动态统计页面数 */}} {{- $totalWeeks := 0 }} {{- $totalArticles := 0 }} {{- range .Site.Pages }} {{- if and (not .IsSection) (not .IsHome) }} {{- if and .File (hasPrefix .File.BaseFileName "week") }} {{- $totalWeeks = add $totalWeeks 1 }} {{- else }} {{- $totalArticles = add $totalArticles 1 }} {{- end }} {{- end }} {{- end }}

HackNews Digest

{{ .Site.Params.description }}

{{ mul (len .Site.Sections) 10 }}+新闻条目
{{ $totalArticles }}深度解读
{{ $totalWeeks }}周度索引
{{ len .Site.Sections }}覆盖月份
{{- if .Site.Sections }}
{{- range (sort .Site.Sections "Section" "desc") }}
{{ .Title }}
{{ len .Pages }} 篇内容
→ {{- end }}
{{- end }} {{- with .Content }}
{{ . }}
{{- end }}
{{- end }}
